text.title: gitops-repository-structure Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gitops-repository-structure as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Direct push to production overlay without a PR.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Bypasses review, breaks audit trail, and prevents automated diff checks from catching dangerous changes (replica drops, RBAC widening, image rollbacks).
